LAW AND MOTION 302,PETITIONER PAII, INC. HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONER PAII, INC.'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PAII, INC. Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner PAII, Inc.'s unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, the Petition to Confirm the Arbitrators' Award is granted and the January 13, 2025, arbitration award is confirmed in its entirety.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PAII, INC. Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Off calendar. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
